final.sql:
WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    s_store_type,
    d_year,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ss_customer_sk) AS customer_count
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  GROUP BY s_store_type, d_year
),
yoy_growth AS (
  SELECT 
    t1.s_store_type,
    t1.d_year AS year,
    t1.customer_count AS current_year_customers,
    t2.customer_count AS prev_year_customers,
    CASE 
      WHEN t2.customer_count IS NULL OR t2.customer_count = 0 THEN ...
